'''ât-k-j-y''' ('''katakjeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maddle|maddle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-k-j-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maddle|maddle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-k-j-y
|-
! Lemma
| katakjeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitakjeyoko|thitakjeyoko]] || [[word:jitakjeyoko|jitakjeyoko]] || [[word:shitakjeyoko|shitakjeyoko]] || [[word:kitakjeyoko|kitakjeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutakjeyoko|thuthutakjeyoko]] || [[word:jujutakjeyoko|jujutakjeyoko]] || [[word:shushutakjeyoko|shushutakjeyoko]] || [[word:kukutakjeyoko|kukutakjeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotakjeyoko|thotakjeyoko]] || [[word:jotakjeyoko|jotakjeyoko]] || [[word:shotakjeyoko|shotakjeyoko]] || [[word:kotakjeyoko|kotakjeyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotakjeyoko|thotakjeyoko]] || [[word:jotakjeyoko|jotakjeyoko]] || [[word:shotakjeyoko|shotakjeyoko]] || [[word:kotakjeyoko|kotakjeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtakjeyoko|thĂŠtakjeyoko]] || [[word:jĂŠtakjeyoko|jĂŠtakjeyoko]] || [[word:shĂŠtakjeyoko|shĂŠtakjeyoko]] || [[word:kĂŠtakjeyoko|kĂŠtakjeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatakjeyoko|thathatakjeyoko]] || [[word:jajatakjeyoko|jajatakjeyoko]] || [[word:shashatakjeyoko|shashatakjeyoko]] || [[word:kakatakjeyoko|kakatakjeyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatakjeyoko|thatakjeyoko]] || [[word:jatakjeyoko|jatakjeyoko]] || [[word:shatakjeyoko|shatakjeyoko]] || [[word:katakjeyoko|katakjeyoko]]
|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
